subcodes.first_line: O Hafez! God preserve thee and strengthen thee upon His straight path. We beseech God to ordain for thee the good of every world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حافظ حفظک الله و ایدک علی صراطه المستقیم انا نسئل الله بان یقدر لک خیر کل عالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
